definitions: To be preoccupied or focused on various matters, often to the exclusion of the present moment or other tasks.
To be thinking about many different issues or concerns.
examples: She couldn't concentrate on the meeting; she had her mind on things at home.
He's been quiet all day, clearly having his mind on things.
It's hard to relax when you have your mind on things constantly.
synonyms: have a lot on your mind
